extortion.description: Bowman Trailer Leasing specializes in nationwide trailer leasing, offering a range of products including flatbeds, dry vans, and storage containers. They serve the transportation, construction, manufacturing, and retail industries with over 30 locations across the eastern United States. Established in 1972, the company provides reliable services and real-time asset tracking for their clients. With a strong focus on customer service, Bowman Trailer Leasing aims to meet diverse transportation and storage needs.
